function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet. I found Harbor Body (start date from folder name: 2026_05_02), but I could not find a canonical project record for “sailboat refit notebook,” so I cannot compare two project start dates or choose a deletion target without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed process-next-inbox-item workflow, deletion-and-wiping constraints, and inbox AGENTS rule to avoid mutation when request lacks canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence confirms only one of the two referenced projects: 40_projects/2026_05_02_harbor_body/README.MD. Workspace searches for the second project name variants did not yield a canonical project record, so deleting any file would require guessing, which is disallowed by deletion-and-wiping.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
